name: Tuna Fish Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Tomato sauce (8 oz) or 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok over medium heat.
2. Add apple and stir fry for 1-2 minutes until slightly softened.
3. Stir in curry powder, then add tomato sauce.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Add apple juice and tuna, stirring until everything is heated through.
6. Serve hot over cooked rice.
